message: Hey there! Are you new here?
Not really, I'm just here to see the guidance counsellor. Do you know where their office is?
Yeah, it's inside the main building, down the hall on the left. I just came from there.
Great, thanks! I'll head there now.
No problem! Good luck with your meeting.
Let's go find the guidance counsellor's office.

actions.title: Find the guidance counsellor's office
actions.description: You can click or select doors to move between rooms.
